testimonials.quote: Sheri didn't just give me names — she gave me back a piece of myself I didn't know was missing.
testimonials.name: Maria T.

testimonials.quote: I've worked with two other genealogists. Sheri is the one who actually found what I was looking for.
testimonials.name: Diane W.

testimonials.quote: She handled the hard part — the news no one wanted to hear — with so much grace. I'll never forget that.
testimonials.name: James R.

testimonials.quote: The legacy book Sheri made for our parents made my mother cry. In a good way. We'll have it forever.
testimonials.name: The Hendersons

testimonials.quote: I went in confused about my DNA results. I came out with answers — and a roadmap.
testimonials.name: Tom L.

testimonials.quote: She found my brother. There aren't really words for what that meant.
testimonials.name: Rachel B.
